# Load the quranic_verses.json and search for the span
import json, re, unicodedata, sys

qfile = "/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json"
hfile = "/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(qfile, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    qdata = json.load(f)

len(qdata), list(qdata.keys())[:10] if isinstance(qdata, dict) else type(qdata)

matches = [entry for entry in qdata if "لَا يَغُرَّنَّكَ" in entry['ayah_text']]
len(matches), matches[:5]

hud = [e for e in qdata if e['surah_name']=='هود']
len(hud), hud[:5]
[e for e in hud if e['ayah_id'] in (19,20)]

# Implement normalization and search
import re
import unicodedata
from collections import defaultdict
from math import inf

def normalize_arabic(s):
    if s is None:
        return ""
    # unify common variations
    s = s.replace("ـ", "")  # tatweel
    # Normalize hamza forms to bare alif
    s = s.replace("أ", "ا").replace("إ","ا").replace("آ","ا")
    s = s.replace("ى","ي")
    s = s.replace("ؤ","و").replace("ئ","ي")
    # Keep ة as is? maybe replace with ه? don't
    # Strip diacritics (unicode category Mn)
    s_norm = unicodedata.normalize('NFKD', s)
    s_no_diac = "".join(ch for ch in s_norm if not unicodedata.category(ch).startswith("M"))
    # Remove punctuation and symbols
    # Keep Arabic letters and numbers and basic Latin letters in case
    # Replace any non-alphanumeric/Arabic letters with space
    # Arabic letters range: \u0600-\u06FF and \u0750-\u077F and \u08A0-\u08FF and \uFB50-\uFDFF and \uFE70-\uFEFF
    s_clean = re.sub(r"[^\w\u0600-\u06FF\u0750-\u077F\u08A0-\u08FF\uFB50-\uFDFF\uFE70-\uFEFF]+", " ", s_no_diac)
    # collapse spaces
    s_clean = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s_clean).strip()
    return s_clean

# test normalization
orig = "لَا يَغُرَّنَّكَ تَقَلُّبُ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا فِي الْبِلَادِ * مَتَاعٌ قَلِيلٌ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ"
print(orig)
print(normalize_arabic(orig))

full_span = "لَا يَغُرَّنَّكَ تَقَلُّبُ الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا فِي الْبِلَادِ * مَتَاعٌ قَلِيلٌ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ * وَلَا يَحْزُنكَ الَّذِينَ يُسَارِعُونَ فِي الْكُفْرِ إِنَّهُمْ لَن يَضُرُّوا اللَّهَ شَيْئًا يُرِيدُ اللَّهُ أَلَّا يَجْعَلَ لَهُمْ حَظًّا فِي الْآخِرَةِ وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ عَظِيمٌ"
snippet = "لَا يَغُرّ...بٌ عَظِيمٌ"  # provided snippet is truncated, not useful.

norm_full = normalize_arabic(full_span)
norm_full

# Precompute normalized ayah texts
for e in qdata[:5]:
    e['norm_text'] = normalize_arabic(e['ayah_text'])

# find ayahs whose normalized text is a substring in normalized full span
matches_substr = [e for e in qdata if e.get('norm_text') and e['norm_text'] in norm_full]
len(matches_substr), [(m['surah_name'], m['ayah_id'], m['ayah_text']) for m in matches_substr[:20]]

entry_176 = [e for e in qdata if e['surah_id']==3 and e['ayah_id']==176]
entry_176, entry_176[0]['norm_text'][:200] if entry_176 else None

matches = []
for e in qdata:
    if e['norm_text'] and e['norm_text'] in norm_full:
        start = norm_full.find(e['norm_text'])
        matches.append((start, e))
# sort by start
matches_sorted = sorted(matches, key=lambda x: x[0])
[(m[0], m[1]['surah_name'], m[1]['ayah_id'], m[1]['ayah_text']) for m in matches_sorted[:20]]

# Build combined candidate using matched ayahs in order
# Use the three matched ayahs we saw: 
candidates = [matches_sorted[0][1], matches_sorted[1][1], matches_sorted[2][1]]
combined_text = " ".join([c['ayah_text'] for c in candidates])
combined_norm = normalize_arabic(combined_text)

full_tokens = norm_full.split()
cand_tokens = combined_norm.split()

def f1_tokens(a_tokens, b_tokens):
    set_a = a_tokens
    set_b = b_tokens
    # use multiset intersection counting min counts for tokens
    from collections import Counter
    ca = Counter(set_a)
    cb = Counter(set_b)
    common = sum(min(ca[t], cb.get(t,0)) for t in ca)
    if common==0:
        return 0.0, 0, len(set_a), len(set_b)
    precision = common / sum(ca.values())
    recall = common / sum(cb.values())
    f1 = 2*precision*recall / (precision+recall)
    return f1, precision, recall

f1, p, r = f1_tokens(cand_tokens, full_tokens)
f1, p, r, len(cand_tokens), len(full_tokens), combined_text[:300]
